title: FAQ: Does AgDR require post-quantum cryptography?
desc: Optional. Core uses Ed25519 + BLAKE3. AgDR-Mantle adds ML-DSA-65, sparse Merkle witnesses, and Brotli compression.

title: FAQ: How to install AgDR?
desc: pip3 install agdr-aki for Python. cargo add agdr-aki for Rust. Prebuilt wheels for all major platforms. No Rust toolchain required.

title: FAQ: Is AgDR compliant?
desc: Yes. EU AI Act Article 14, 52, 12. Canada Evidence Act s.31.1. NIST AI RMF GOV-1.1 through MEA-2.1.

title: FAQ: What is AgDR?
desc: Atomic Genesis Decision Record. Cryptographically sealed record of every AI inference capturing Provenance, Place, Purpose at sub-microsecond latency.

title: FAQ: What is Genesis Glass Foundation?
desc: Canada Not-for-profit Corporation No. 1779509-2. Steward of the AgDR open standard under CC0 / Apache 2.0.

title: FAQ: What platforms are supported?
desc: Windows x64, Linux x86_64 and aarch64, macOS Intel and Apple Silicon, ARMv6l/ARMv7l via piwheels. Python 3.9 through 3.14.
